About

A bit
about me

I'm a 3D artist with a passion for the video game industry. I have experience with sculpting and hard surface modeling, and I enjoy bringing other people's concepts to life.

I've worked on shipped titles such as Path of Light, and I've built assets for Unreal Engine 4, 5, and Unity.

I take pride in the work I do and I'm excited to have the oppurtunity to work in the industry I love.
